subject: Re: booker
body:
first  she only made 135 at next... , her contract is
intact  you don't want to begin a new agency with a
hassle... gerald will only be ther for one more year,,
you have a great opportunity,, to take all the girls.

--- Jeanluc Brunel <jeanluc@mc2mm.com> wrote:

> Hi
> 
> I will not take this booker from Faith.
> 
> Nathalie is already giving me a lot of pressure.
> This is ok
> 
> But, when she will tell Gerald that she is not
> coming, I will need your help
> to cool the situation.
> 
> I will look for someone else but Gerald might react
> badly 
> 
> I am buying time with Nathalie until Monday...
> 
> Enjoy the sun
> 
> jl
> 
>
